commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=94cffc864b20fcb8233066e78585dd2822a69800)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds CLI validation for broker-returned GitHub OAuth login URLs, adds focused Go regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows the broker-controlled StartGitHubLogin response reaches openBrowser or manual URL output without a scheme/host/path allowlist; I did not execute the OS opener because that would intentionally dispatch a local URL handler.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the contributor must provide real behavior proof and the release-owned changelog edit should be removed before merge; ClawSweeper should not queue an automated repair while proof is missing.

target.title: fix: validate GitHub login browser targets
target.body:
## Summary

- validate every broker-returned GitHub OAuth authorization URL before using it
- require the expected HTTPS `github.com/login/oauth/authorize` endpoint
- reject invalid targets before canonical broker migration, browser dispatch, manual printing, or polling
- add focused helper and login-flow regression coverage

Closes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/373

## Verification

- `go test -race ./internal/cli -run 'TestGitHubLogin|TestValidateGitHubLoginURL|TestCanonicalBrokerURL' -count=1`
- Codex autoreview: clean, no actionable findings
- `go test -race ./...` reached unrelated current-main permission-test failures; those failures reproduce with this patch stashed. The Apple VZ timeout failure passed on focused rerun.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
